rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"AuthService test pattern: mock @/getPayload, new JwtService('test-secret'), new AuthService(mockPayload, jwtService), vi.clearAllMocks() in beforeEach — apply to all auth endpoint tests.","scope":"src/api/auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"login.ts was using UserStore SHA-256 while register.ts used AuthService PBKDF2 — these must be unified so Payload is the single auth source.","scope":"src/api/auth/login.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"login.ts becomes a thin wrapper; all user lookup, PBKDF2 verification (25000 iters), token gen, and refresh token storage live in AuthService.login().","scope":"src/api/auth/login.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"register.ts already delegates to authService.login() at line 69 — login.ts follows the same delegation pattern.","scope":"src/api/auth/register.ts"}]}
